---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What pain point exists today?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you want to happen.

## Design test

Does this feature pass all four design tests?

- [ ] It does not require the gate to form an opinion about whether an action should be allowed
- [ ] It does not require access to the content of an agent's reasoning
- [ ] It does not add latency to actions that are not protected
- [ ] It does not create dependency on a specific model, agent framework, or infrastructure provider

If any box is unchecked, explain why the tradeoff is justified.

## Invariant check

Does this feature affect any [invariants](docs/MANIFEST-INVARIANTS.md)? If so, which ones and how?
